stages.concept:
# Unit 060: to부정사의 명사적 용법 (주어, 목적어, 보어) - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **to부정사의 명사적 용법**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **To read** books is fun.
> 책을 읽는 것은 재미있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: to부정사(to + 동사원형)가 명사처럼 쓰이는 것을 **명사적 용법**이라고 해요. 주어, 목적어, 보어 자리에 올 수 있어요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **주어** 자리에 올 때 — ~하는 것은

> **To learn** English is important.
> 영어를 배우는 것은 중요하다.

> **To travel** around the world is my dream.
> 세계 여행을 하는 것은 나의 꿈이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 주어가 길어지면 **It ~ to** 구문을 많이 써요.

> **It** is important **to learn** English.
> 영어를 배우는 것은 중요하다.

> **It** is fun **to play** soccer.
> 축구를 하는 것은 재미있다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **목적어** 자리에 올 때 — ~하는 것을

> I want **to eat** pizza.
> 나는 피자를 먹고 싶다.

> She decided **to study** abroad.
> 그녀는 유학하기로 결심했다.

**Q. 다음 중 to부정사가 '목적어' 자리에 쓰인 문장을 고르세요.**
1. To travel around the world is my dream. (주어)
2. She decided to study abroad. ✅ (목적어)
3. My dream is to be a teacher. (보어)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **보어** 자리에 올 때 — ~하는 것이다

> My dream is **to be** a teacher.
> 나의 꿈은 선생님이 되는 것이다.

> My plan is **to travel** to Europe.
> 나의 계획은 유럽을 여행하는 것이다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: to부정사가 주어(~하는 것은), 목적어(~하는 것을), 보어(~하는 것이다)로 쓰이는 거군요! It ~ to 구문도 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 060: to부정사의 명사적 용법 주어, 목적어, 보어 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
To help your friends is very important.
> **정답** 주어

---

**02.** She wants to buy a new bag.
> **정답** 목적어

---

**03.** My dream is to become a teacher.
> **정답** 보어

---

**04.** To learn a language takes time.
> **정답** 주어

---

**05.** He decided to join the soccer team.
> **정답** 목적어

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
To reading books is fun.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** reading → read

---

**07.** She wants to goes shopping.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes → go

---

**08.** His goal is to became a pilot.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** became → become

---

**09.** I hope to met her again.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** met → meet

---

**10.** To exercising every day is good for health.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** exercising → exercise

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
영어를 배우는 것은 재미있다.
English is fun.
> **정답** To learn

---

**12.** 그녀는 가수가 되기를 원한다.
She wants a singer.
> **정답** to become (to be)

---

**13.** 나의 꿈은 의사가 되는 것이다.
My dream is a doctor.
> **정답** to become (to be)

---

**14.** 매일 운동하는 것은 중요하다.
every day is important.
> **정답** To exercise

---

**15.** 그는 새로운 것을 배우기로 결심했다.
He decided something new.
> **정답** to learn

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
일찍 일어나는 것은 건강에 좋다.
To get up early is for health good
> **정답** To / get / up / early / is / good / for / health

---

**17.** 나는 외국에 가고 싶다.
want to I go abroad
> **정답** I / want / to / go / abroad

---

**18.** 그의 목표는 요리사가 되는 것이다.
His a chef to goal is become
> **정답** His / goal / is / to / become / a / chef

---

**19.** 음악을 듣는 것은 나를 행복하게 한다.
To music listen to makes me happy
> **정답** To / listen / to / music / makes / me / happy

---

**20.** 그녀는 새 언어를 배우기로 결심했다.
decided She learn to a new language
> **정답** She / decided / to / learn / a / new / language
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 060: to부정사의 명사적 용법 주어, 목적어, 보어 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
My job is to make children happy.
> **정답** 보어

---

**02.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
To survive in the jungle is difficult.
> **정답** 주어

---

**03.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
I refused to apologize in front of everyone.
> **정답** 목적어

---

**04.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
What time do you expect to arrive in Chicago?
> **정답** 목적어

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 해당하는 것을 고르시오.
The most important thing is to be honest.
> **정답** 보어

---

**06.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
My advice is (     ) hot water.
> **정답** to drink

---

**07.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
(     ) a foreign language is difficult.
> **정답** To master

---

**08.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
They decided (     ) to Seoul next year.
> **정답** to move

---

**09.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
She planned (     ) the science museum this
weekend.
> **정답** to visit

---

**10.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
To write an article (     ) lots of time.
> **정답** takes

---

**11.** 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
Her dream is become an actress.
> **정답** to become

---

**12.** 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
To play with friends be fun.
> **정답** is

---

**13.** 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
I need buy fruits and vegetables at the
grocery story.
> **정답** to buy

---

**14.** 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
Touch the beehive be dangerous.
> **정답** To touch, is

---

**15.** 주어진 말을 어법에 맞게 고치시오.
My wish is win the game.
> **정답** to win

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리는 그를 돕겠다고 약속했다.
help promised We
him. to
> **정답** We / promised / to / help / him.

---

**17.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
우리의 계획은 바다 사자를 연구하는 것입니다.
study is lions sea
Our to plan
> **정답** Our / plan / is / to / study / sea / lions

---

**18.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
감정을 표현하는 것은 매우 중요합니다.
is feelings express
very To your
important
> **정답** To / express / your / feelings / is / very / important

---

**19.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
Tom은 조용한 곳에서 공부하는 걸 선호해요
Tom prefers study
to a quiet place. in
> **정답** Tom / prefers / to / study / in / a quiet place.

---

**20.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그들은 마늘 먹는 것을 원하지 않았다.
garlic. They want
didn't to eat
> **정답** They / didn't / want / to / eat / garlic.
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 060 to부정사의 명사적 용법 주어, 목적어, 보어 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to부정사를 사용할
것)
시험을 위해 공부하는 것은 학생들에게 필수이다. [study,
be]
  (     )  for exams  (     )  a must for students.
정답 To, study, is

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to부정사를 사용할
것)
그 소년의 꿈은 미래에 대통령이 되는 것이다. [become,
a president]
His dream is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in the
future.
정답 to, become, a, president

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (to부정사를 사용할
것)
그녀는 주말에 영화 보는 것을 좋아한다. [like, watch,
movies]
She  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  on weekends.
정답 likes, to, watch, movies

---

**04.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
become, a famous artist
A: What do you want to be when you grow older?
B: I want  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  when
I grow older.
정답 to, become, a, famous, artist

---

**05.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
spend time, with my dog
A: Lisa, what do you usually like to do after school?
B: I like  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
 after school.
정답 to, spend, time, with, my, dog

---

**06.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오.
힌트 (     ) want, see, in his office
A: What did your math teacher want?
B: The teacher  (     )   (     )   (     )  me 
  (     ) .
정답 wanted, to, see, in, his, office

---

**07.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
become / listen / live / make
To be the youngest child of this family is a sad thing. I
want  (     )  an only child. My brother
makes joke about me. And my sister always pinches
me. They like  (     )  me cry for fun. My
parents don't like  (     )  to my
complains. I really hope  (     )  alone.
• only child 외동(딸·아들)
• pinch 꼬집다
정답 to become, to make (making), to listen (listening), to
live

---

**08.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 목적어 역할을 하는 to부정사를 모두
고르시오. [2개]
(1)To learn English may be difficult, but all students
want (2)to be good at it. Their goal is (3)to talk with
American people. My goal is also (4)to speak English
well. So I decided (5)to practice English every day.
정답 2, 5

---

**09.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 보어 역할을 하는 to부정사를
고르시오.
Tom's plan for the future is ① to buy a big house
because he wants ② to live with many people. He
decides ③ to live with his dad, mom, his future wife,
his future children, and his close friends. He starts ④
to look for a big house with many rooms. But, ⑤ to
buy a big house costs a lot of money.
정답 1

---

**10.** 다음 밑줄 친 것 중 주어 역할을 하는 to부정사를
고르시오.
For quiet Lisa, ① to make friends is not that easy.
She wants ② to talk and spend time with friends but
she is always too shy. ③ To get closer with
classmates, she needs ④[ to try ]harder ⑤ to talk
more.
• quiet 조용한
정답 1

---

**11.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[To]  [spend]  [time]  [with]  [friends]  [are]
[fun.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 are → is

---

**12.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[We]  [expect]  [pass]  [the]  [exam.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 pass → to pass

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
(to부정사 사용[)]
[My]  [plan]  is]  [study]  [in]  [America.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 study → to study

---

**14.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
영어로 말하는 것은 쉽지 않다. [English, to, speak]
  (     )   (     )  is not easy.
정답 To, speak, English

---

**15.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
Tom은 고장난 컴퓨터를 고치고 싶었다. [fix, wanted,
to]
Tom  (     )   (     )   (     )  the broken computer.
정답 wanted, to, fix

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
그녀의 꿈은 궁전에서 사는 것이다. [to, her, is, live,
dream]
  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  in a palace.
정답 Her, dream, is, to, live

---

**17.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 다음 글을 완성하시오.
carry / build / complete / make
The builder has a plan. His plan is 
a huge house on a mountain.  (     )  it
happen, he needs  (     )  blocks to the
high mountain. It will be hard work, but he expects
 his plan alone and within a year.
정답 to build, To make, to carry, to complete

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Joy]  [decided]  [sending]  a  [letter]  [to]
[him.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 sending → to send

---

**19.** 다음을 영작하시오.
새로운 사람을 만나는 것은 신난다. [meet, exciting]
  (     )  new people  (     )   (     ) .
정답 To, meet, is, exciting

---

**20.** 다음을 영작하시오.
나는 영어 선생님이 되기를 원한다. [want, become, an
English teacher]
I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 want, to, become, an, English, teacher

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 060: to부정사의 명사적 용법 주어, 목적어, 보어 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I plan ____________ in Seoul next year. to study to studying study studied
> 정답: to study

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
______________ a doctor in the future is my dream.
And his dream is _______________ as a scientist.
Become - work To become - work To become - to work Become - to work
> 정답: To become - to work

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
________________ math is difficult.
But students need _________________ it.
To learn - study Learn - study To learn - to study To learning - to studying
> 정답: To learn - to study

---

**04.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 고르시오.
Amy likes to go hiking on weekends.
My mom's plan is to eat out tonight.
To become a great cook takes hard work.
To see is to believe.
Tom decided to take art class next month.
> 정답: Tom decided to take art class next month.

---

**05.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 고르시오.
Jake's goal is to finish a group project next week.
Mina planned to finish her report by tomorrow.
His job is to help customers at the shop.
Amy wanted to walk along the river with her cat.
To be a leader takes a lot of effort and time.
> 정답: His job is to help customers at the shop.

---

**06.** 다음 보기의 밑줄친 부분과 같은 쓰임으로 쓰인 to부정사를 고르시오.
To use a phone in class may cause problems.
Tom hopes to be a famous artist.
To wake up early every morning is my new goal.
Jake didn't want to make the same errors again.
Mina's favorite hobby is to play board games.
> 정답: To wake up early every morning is my new goal.

---

**07.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Students often decide to make plans in January.
To understand new languages are very difficult.
Mina forgot to attend the club meeting last Friday.
My dream is to become a best-selling author.
> 정답: To understand new languages are very difficult.

---

**08.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They love to talk to each other in their free time.
To organize toys take time.
To see strangers at night can be scary.
She wanted to call him back after dinner.
> 정답: To organize toys take time.

---

**09.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
많은 과목을 배우는 것은 어렵지만 의미있는 일이다.
To study many subjects are difficult but meaningful tasks.
To study many subjects is a difficult but meaningful task.
Study many subjects is a difficult but meaningful task.
To studying many subjects is a difficult but meaningful task.
> 정답: To study many subjects is a difficult but meaningful

---

**10.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 그녀에게 먼저 사과하기로 결심했다.
Tom decided apologize to her first.
Tom decided apologizing to her first.
Tom decided to apologizing to her first.
Tom decided to apologize to her first.
> 정답: Tom decided to apologize to her first.

---

**11.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy의 계획은 그녀의 에세이 쓰기를 오후까지 끝내는 것이다.
Amy's plan are finishing writing her essay by the afternoon.
Amy's plan are to finish writing her essay by the afternoon.
Amy's plan is to finishing writing her essay by the afternoon.
Amy's plan is to finish writing her essay by the afternoon.
